mapper.select: SELECT productSeq, productName, productDesc, imageURL, price, createdAt FROM product ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 6;

SELECT p.productSeq, p.productName, p.imageURL, p.price *(1 - (d.discountRate * 0.01)) AS reducedPrice, CONCAT(ROUND(d.discountRate), '%') AS discountRate FROM product p JOIN discount d ON p.discountSeq = d.discountSeq WHERE p.discountSeq IS NOT NULL;
